name: Freshrss With Mariadb
description:
A free, self-hostable feed aggregator.

Docs: https://freshrss.org/index.html?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  freshrss:
    image: freshrss/freshrss:latest
    environment:
      - CRON_MIN=${CRON_MIN:-1,31}
      - MARIADB_DB=${MARIADB_DATABASE:-freshrss}
      - MARIADB_USER=u5a2e06b768
      - MARIADB_PASSWORD=78206a0bf0b1e0282422f3136c6c9a5a
    volumes:
      - freshrss-data:/var/www/FreshRSS/data
      - freshrss-extensions:/var/www/FreshRSS/extensions
    depends_on:
      freshrss-db:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - bash -c ':> /dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/80' || exit 1
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42037:80
  freshrss-db:
    image: mariadb:11
    volumes:
      - mariadb-data:/var/lib/mysql
    environment:
      - MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=34b02dbe4296c337e2a8a865baddf8a8
      - MYSQL_DATABASE=${MARIADB_DATABASE:-freshrss}
      - MYSQL_USER=u5a2e06b768
      - MYSQL_PASSWORD=78206a0bf0b1e0282422f3136c6c9a5a
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - healthcheck.sh
        - --connect
        - --innodb_initialized
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  freshrss-data: null
  freshrss-extensions: null
  mariadb-data: null
